manualTask.title: New Task
manualTask.description: Create a task manually — fill in the details yourself, no AI.

emailReader.noContent: No content available for this email.

settingsTabs.noAppsEnabled: No apps enabled for this organization
settingsTabs.platformDescription: System-level management — users, orgs, apps, logs and usage.

whatsappPage.title: WhatsApp Messages
whatsappPage.noThreads: No messages yet. They'll show up here once they arrive.
whatsappPage.selectAThread: Select a chat to view its messages
whatsappPage.windowClosed: The 24-hour window is closed. Per Meta's rules, only approved templates can be sent outside the window. Wait for the contact to message first.
whatsappPage.windowClosedShort: 24-hour window closed — can't send free text
whatsappPage.activeMinutesAgo: Active {count, plural, one {1 minute} other {# minutes}} ago
whatsappPage.activeHoursAgo: Active {count, plural, one {1 hour} other {# hours}} ago
whatsappPage.activeDaysAgo: Active {count, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}} ago
whatsappPage.tasksFromChat: {count, plural, one {1 task from this chat} other {# tasks from this chat}}
whatsappPage.noReceiptsTooltip: Meta accepted the message. Delivery (✓✓) and read (blue ✓✓) receipts aren't available on the current DualHook setup — check the full status in the WhatsApp app on the phone.
whatsappPage.newChatHint: Enter an international phone number + your first message.
whatsappPage.newChatWindowClosed: Meta blocks new conversations with contacts who haven't messaged you. An approved Template Message is required (not yet supported here).
whatsappPage.newChatTemplateWarning: ⚠️ Meta only allows free-form messages within 24h of the contact's last message. Starting a brand-new conversation with someone who hasn't messaged you requires an approved Template Message.

auth.noInviteError: Access by invitation only. Contact your administrator.

invite.title: You've been invited
invite.googleHint: Use the exact Google account that received this invitation.
invite.alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
invite.expired: This invitation has expired. Please ask for a new one.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.completionBanner: The AI thinks this task may be done — approve closing it or send it back to inbox.

calendar.noDateHint: {count, plural, one {1 task without a date} other {# tasks without a date}}

tasks.noTasksYet: No tasks yet. They will appear here after AI processes your messages.
tasks.duplicateSuggestionBadgeTitle: Possible duplicate of an existing task — open to review and merge

actions.noWhatsappContact: No WhatsApp number for this task
actions.savedToKnowledge: Saved to memory — next time a similar question arrives, this answer will be drafted automatically
actions.savedToKnowledgePending: Sent for manager approval — once approved, this answer will serve the whole org
actions.knowledgeUnavailable: Saving to memory is unavailable right now (missing Voyage key)

checklist.title: Checklist
checklist.promotedToast: Item converted to a new task

search.placeholder: Search tasks, T<#>, or source G/S/W/E/D/C<#>...

router.title: Update
router.description: Write freely and smrtTask will decide whether to create a task, update an existing one, or add an update.
router.placeholder: Describe what to do — add a task, update an existing one ("T42 pushed to tomorrow"), mark done, or add subtasks.
router.unknownFallback: Couldn't figure out what to do. You can convert the input into a new task.

suggestions.title: Task Suggestions
suggestions.reasonSenderUnimportant: Sender isn't important — block for the future
suggestions.reasonSenderTypeUnimportant: From this sender — only this type
suggestions.reasonSenderTypePropose: Skip mails from this sender whose subject contains:
suggestions.reasonSenderTypeKeywordPlaceholder: Type a word that appears in the subject — e.g. Deployment Failed
suggestions.reasonSenderTypeKeywordRequired: Need a keyword to block a specific type
suggestions.reasonCustomPlaceholder: Tell us why — the AI will learn from this and propose a rule for your approval
suggestions.ruleProposedToast: AI proposed a rule ({trigger}) — pending your approval in settings
suggestions.projectsDetectedNightly: Projects are detected nightly from your message patterns

merge.targetNewHelp: Create a new task unifying {count} items. AI will propose title, description, and checklist.
merge.noCandidates: No matching tasks. Try a different search.
merge.aiFailed: AI couldn't propose — you can edit manually
merge.bgRunningToast: Merge is running in background — we'll let you know when ready
merge.chipRunningTooltip: AI is finishing your merge proposal. We'll let you know when ready.
merge.alreadyDoneHint: Looks like this was already done
merge.titleRequired: Title required in at least one language
merge.noSourcesLeft: All items removed — nothing to merge

aiTrail.title: Why did the AI create this?
aiTrail.noSource: No source — task was created manually
aiTrail.subject: Subject

transcriptionExperiment.title: Transcription A/B Experiment
transcriptionExperiment.howToEnable: Enable via Admin → App Secrets → TRANSCRIPTION_EXPERIMENT_ENABLED=true

log.title: Source Log
log.entriesAppearAfter: Messages will appear after sources are synced

projects.title: Projects
projects.createOrWait: Create manually or wait for AI detection

step1.title: Connect Gmail & Calendar
step1.description: We'll scan your emails and calendar events

driveFoldersStep.title: Pick folders to scan
driveFoldersStep.description: smrtTask will only scan the folders you select here (sub-folders included). You can continue without picking — you'll be able to edit the list later in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dataDeletedRedirecting: All data deleted. Redirecting to onboarding...

settingsParameters.title: smrtTask Parameters
settingsParameters.subtitle: Tune classifier behaviour, project discovery, and WhatsApp sync. Leave blank to use the system default.
settingsParameters.dailyBudgetHint: Once your daily AI spend exceeds this amount, new-message processing stops and per-task AI buttons return an error. Default $10.
settingsParameters.modelHint: Default: claude-sonnet-4-6. Pick haiku for cheap+fast, opus for higher quality.
settingsParameters.ruleThresholdHint: Part 3 won't propose a rule below this confidence. Default 0.7.
settingsParameters.projectMatchThresholdHint: A task won't auto-link to a project below this confidence. Default 0.7.
settingsParameters.projectClusterThresholdHint: Part 4 won't suggest a new project below this confidence. Default 0.65.
settingsParameters.whatsappLookbackHint: How far back Part 2 scans each run. Default 48.

onboardingSetup.scanExplanation: The initial scan fetches all messages and events, classifies them with AI, and creates smart tasks automatically. This may take a few minutes.
onboardingSetup.futureEventsHint: Future events — up to {months} months ahead
onboardingSetup.driveSearchPlaceholder: Search folder or paste Drive URL...
onboardingSetup.driveEmptyHint: Leave empty to scan all files (last 3 months)
onboardingSetup.skipAddressesHint: Add a full email (office@maor.org) or a domain (newsletter.com). Messages matching these are skipped entirely.
onboardingSetup.savingMessages: Saving messages... Processing will continue in the background.
onboardingSetup.backgroundProcessing: The system will process messages in the background and create tasks automatically.
onboardingSetup.largeMailboxWarning: Large mailbox ({count} messages) — background processing may take a few hours.
onboardingSetup.gmailCategoriesHint: These Gmail categories will be filtered out before processing. Recommended defaults are pre-selected.
onboardingSetup.calendarSelectionHint: Only events from selected calendars will be processed.
onboardingSetup.calendarNotConnected: Connect Google Calendar to select calendars.
onboardingSetup.calendarLoadError: Could not load calendars. You can change this in Settings later.

onboardingWhatsapp.title: WhatsApp Connection
onboardingWhatsapp.description: Messages reach smrtTask directly from Meta via DualHook — real-time, no Google Sheet.
onboardingWhatsapp.step1: DualHook routes Meta's webhook straight to the smrtTask backend
onboardingWhatsapp.step2: Every incoming/outgoing message is captured instantly; audio is transcribed and images are OCR'd
onboardingWhatsapp.step3: AI analyzes the conversations and creates tasks
onboardingWhatsapp.dualhookStep2: Paste the webhook URL and Verify Token shown below, click Save Changes then Test Connection
onboardingWhatsapp.dualhookStep3: After saving, fill in the Phone Number ID and WABA ID from the same DualHook screen here
onboardingWhatsapp.phoneNumberIdHint: From DualHook → Account Details → Phone Number ID
onboardingWhatsapp.wabaIdHint: From DualHook → Account Details → WABA ID
onboardingWhatsapp.businessIdHint: From DualHook → Account Details → Business ID. Not needed to receive messages or fetch media — captured only for future account-management features.
onboardingWhatsapp.accessTokenHint: From DualHook → Account Details → Access Token. Stored encrypted in Supabase Vault. Required for audio transcription, image OCR, and document storage.
onboardingWhatsapp.appSecretHint: From Meta Business → App → Settings → Basic → App Secret. Used to verify HMAC on inbound webhooks from Meta.
onboardingWhatsapp.verifyTokenHint: Pick any random string. Paste it here AND into DualHook → Webhook Override → Verify Token. We use it to validate Meta's initial GET handshake.

onboardingOrg.title: Create your workspace
onboardingOrg.description: Tasks, projects, and contacts live inside a workspace. You can invite teammates later.
onboardingOrg.changeLaterHint: You can change this later from settings.
onboardingOrg.slugInvalid: Use only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens

orgSettings.title: Organization Settings
orgSettings.name: Name
orgSettings.errorHandlerDesc: This user receives a notification (as a task suggestion) whenever an app fails technically.

projectsEdit.aiContextPlaceholder: Context to help AI link tasks to this project correctly

briefVerifier.approveFactsHint: Approve correct facts to improve future project matching

projectDetail.infoCenterEmpty: Nothing here yet — save info items and tasks to this project and they'll appear here.
projectDetail.infoSavedToOther: Info saved to the selected project

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.introManager: Your organization's shared knowledge base. Approved answers are reused automatically by the AI when drafting. As a manager you can approve, edit and delete.
knowledge.introMember: Your organization's shared knowledge base. Approved answers are reused automatically by the AI when drafting. You can suggest new info — a manager will approve it.
knowledge.questionPlaceholder: What question or topic does this answer?
knowledge.memberAddHint: This will be sent to a manager for approval before it becomes active.
knowledge.deleteConfirm: Delete this entry from the knowledge base?
knowledge.embeddingUnavailable: Saving to the knowledge base is unavailable right now (missing Voyage key)

adminUsers.serviceRoleMissing: Supabase service-role key is not configured. Email addresses will not show until SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is set in Vercel.

adminUserMemberships.noApps: No apps — user has no org memberships or no orgs have apps enabled.
adminUserMemberships.appAccessHint: Apps are granted at the organization level. To change a user's access, toggle the app on/off for one of their orgs below — or add them to an org that already has the app.
adminUserMemberships.notMemberOfAny: User is not a member of any organization.
adminUserMemberships.searchOrgs: Search orgs by name or slug…
adminUserMemberships.noMatchingOrgs: No matching orgs (or user is already a member).

adminSecrets.title: Keys & Secrets
adminSecrets.description: Manage encrypted platform-wide config and per-WABA WhatsApp credentials. Secret values are stored in Supabase Vault.
adminSecrets.webhookUrlHint: Paste this into DualHook → Webhook Override. Every connected WABA uses the same URL.
adminSecrets.platformHint: Values set once, serving every tenant (Gemini, Meta API version).
adminSecrets.envReadOnlyDescription: These keys are managed as environment variables and shared with an external service. You can only see whether each is set — to change one, update it in the hosting environment (Vercel, etc.).
adminSecrets.envReadOnlyHint: Read-only — environment variables shared with an external service. Edit them in the hosting environment, not here.
adminSecrets.connectionsHint: Per-WABA Meta secrets. Use this to rotate tokens after one expires.
adminSecrets.rotateHint: Empty fields are left alone — only fields you fill in get updated.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.overviewSubtitle: At-a-glance status per screen — tap a card to open that tab
admin.alertSyncStopped: Sync stopped for some users (consecutive failures ≥ 5)
admin.deleteOrgConfirm: PERMANENTLY delete "{name}" and ALL its tasks/projects/members? This cannot be undone.
admin.deleteOrgConfirm2: Are you absolutely sure? This org has {tasks} tasks and {projects} projects.
admin.removeMemberConfirm: Remove this member from the org?
admin.noAppsInRegistry: No apps in the registry yet.
admin.appServicesDesc: Connected user services (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, WhatsApp) and their sync state.
admin.appPromptsDesc: AI prompt configuration for this app (classifier, project briefs, etc.).
admin.appSecretsDesc: Manage this app's API keys and secrets.
admin.appDocumentsDesc: This app's plan and spec documents.
admin.appDocumentsPageHint: Plan, spec and idea documents for this app.
admin.appDocumentsEmpty: No plan documents for this app yet.
admin.appGuideDesc: Open the user-facing guide page for this app.
admin.addDirectNotFound: User not found — send an invite instead
admin.noAppsYet: No apps yet — register the first one.
admin.slugCannotChange: Slug cannot be changed after registration.
admin.slugError: Slug must be lowercase letters/numbers/dashes, 2–40 chars, starting with a letter
admin.unregisterConfirm: Unregister "{name}"? This will revoke access for ALL {count} orgs currently using it.
admin.searchOrgs: Search name, slug, or owner email…
admin.createOrgSlugHint: Auto-generated from name. Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens.
admin.noMatchingUsers: No matching users (or they're already super-admins).
admin.aiPromptsDesc: Edit the prompts used by the AI pipeline. Changes take effect on the next run.
admin.appParametersDesc: Models, batch sizes, calendar window and body-truncation limits

adminParameters.title: System Parameters
adminParameters.description: Global controls for the AI processing pipeline. Changes here affect every user.
adminParameters.modelsDesc: Models used for pre-classification and task creation
adminParameters.limitsDesc: Batch sizes, calendar window, and how much body text goes to the AI

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.copiedForAi: Details copied — paste here into the AI

settingsRules.title: Filter Rules
settingsRules.calendarsLoadError: Couldn't load calendars. You may need to reconnect Google.
settingsRules.skipAddressesEmpty: No blocked addresses. Add a rule with trigger from= / to= / domain= to block a sender or domain.

form.nameLabel: Name (as it appears in the script)

guide.title: smrtVoice guide
guide.intro: Full pipeline: create characters → import script → record → generate → outputs.

cloneUploader.voiceTypePro: Pro — high quality, ~few minutes of training
cloneUploader.successTraining: Clone is training (we'll notify you when ready)
cloneUploader.help: Upload a clean 30–60 second recording (no background noise, no music). Resemble learns the voice and returns a voice_id used for generation.

recordingUploader.help: WAV/MP3 file of the full recording. voice-engine will split it by silence and match each line to the matching segment.

driveFolders.title: Drive folders to scan
driveFolders.description: smrtTask only scans folders listed here, including all their sub-folders. A folder that isn't on the list won't be ingested — even if you opened it recently.
driveFolders.empty: You haven't picked any folders yet. No Drive files will be scanned until you add at least one.
driveFolders.recursiveNote: Files anywhere inside a listed folder are scanned recursively. Changes take effect on the next sync.
driveFolders.driveNotConnected: Google Drive isn't connected. Connect Drive on the Account page before picking folders.
